cbb.headline: Sources: Duke-Michigan game off; Texas Tech replaces Wolverines

mlb.description: Opitoned RHP Yunior Tuir To Las Vegas (PCL).
Sent RHP Ben Joyce on a rehab assignment to Salt Lake (PCL).
Sent RHP Justin Lawrence outright to Rochester (IL).
Sent RHP Clay Holmes on a rehab assignment to Syracuse (IL).
Sent LF Brandon Lockridge on a rehab assignment to Nashville (IL).
Optioned RHP Noah Murdock to Indianapolis (IL). Acquired RHP Ron Marinaccio from San Diego in exchange for future considerations. Designated RHP Dennis Santana for assignment.
Sent RHP Josh Ekness on a rehab assignment to Jacksonville (IL).
Sent CF Brenton Doyle on a rehab assignment to Albuquerque (PCL).
Agreed to terms with RHP Christopher Asencio on a minor league contract.

Agreed to terms with OF Caden Sorrell, INFs Myles Bailey and Corey Nunez, RHPs Dylan Blomker, Isaac Morton, Lance Williams, Chase Meyer, Griffin Naess, Ashton Pocol and Ryan Marton, LHP Brandon Arvidson and C Brennan Hudson on rookie contracts. Sent LHP Drew Pomeranz outright to Iowa (IL). Opitoned DH Kevin Alcántara to Iowa.
Sent RHP Manuel Rodríguez on a rehab assignment to FCL Rays. Optioned RHP Jesse Scholtens to Durham (IL).
Optioned CF Spencer Jones to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre (IL).
Optioned LHP Eduardo Rivera to Worcester (IL).
Optioned RF Johnathan Rodríguez and LHP Josh Walker to Norfolk (IL). Claimed C Yohel Pozo off waivers from St. Louis and optioned him to Norfolk.
Placed LF Jonatan Clase on the 10-day IL retroactive to July 21. Optioned RHP Lazaro Estrada to Buffalo (IL). Recalled RHP CJ Van Eyk from Buffalo. Recalled LF Yohendrick Pinango from Buffalo (IL).
Agreed to terms with C Carlos Perez on a minor-league contract.
Sent LHP DL Hall on a rehab assignment to Nashville (IL).
Recalled LHP Alec Gamboa from Worcester (IL).

Agreed to terms with Cs Cashel Dugger and Francisco Rivero, IF Avery Ortiz, 2B Chris Hacopian, 3B Daniel Cuvet, SS Luke Williams, OFs Jack Brooks, Nick Williams and Chase Brunson, LHP Matthew Dallas and RHPs Anson Seibert, Weston Moss, Cody Howard, Zack Konstantinovsky, Max Hansmann, Gage Peterson, Cooper Allen and Cooper Harris on contracts.
Recalled RHP Hunter Dobbins from Memphis (IL). Designated RHP Scott Blewett for assignment.
Recalled RHP Noah Murdock from Indianapolis (IL). Agreed to terms with 2B Chris Rembert on a contract.
Sent RHP Edwin Díaz on a rehab assignment to Oklahoma City (PCL).
Reinstated LHP Martín Pérez from the IL. Optioned RHP JR Ritchie to Gwinnett (IL).
Recalled CF Spencer Jones from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre (IL). Reinstated LHP Max Fried from the 15-day IL. Optioned RHP Kervin Castro to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre (IL).

Sent RHP Garrett Acton on a rehab assignment to St. Paul (IL). Agreed to terms with RHPs Jackson Sleeper, Brian Strange, Ryne Palmer and Tyler Bryan on minor league contracts. Agreed to terms with RHPs Michael Barnett, Alec Bouchard, Connor Mattison, Colter McAnelly, Kole Klecker, Tommy LaPour, Steele Murdock, Ethan Lay, Max Bayles, Thomas Burns, JT Raab, Ethan Wachsmann and Brett Renfrow, OF Aidan Teel, 2B Colby Turner, SSs Isaiah Lane, Charlie Scholvin and PJ Moutzouridis and Cs Hideki Prather, Vahn Lackey and Carson Tinney on contracts.
